name: extractor dry-run emits a structured json array of patterns scoped to the source PR with pr_number provenance
command: printf '{"number":42,"diff":"diff content","comments":[{"body":"avoid raw query string concatenation"}]}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-patterns.sh" --pr pr.json --dry-run --out patterns.json 2>err.txt && node -e "const a=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('patterns.json','utf8'));if(!Array.isArray(a))process.exit(1);if(!a.every(p=>p.pr_number===42))process.exit(2);" && echo ok 1>&2
